summary: Frontend-only testing for rarity SVG badge feature. All checks passed: /cards renders 100 rarity icons (100/100 loaded, naturalWidth>0), correct file mapping per rarity (common/uncommon/rare/mythic .svg), filter chips confirm 1:1 mapping (common->common.svg, rare->rare.svg, mythic->mythic.svg). Card modal (card-modal) opens and includes rarity icon. /print HOBBY mode shows rarity icons on fronts (100 loaded). /print PROFESSIONAL mode shows 101 pro pages with 100 rarity icons loaded. SVG (.zip) export triggered a download (glimmerfall_nature_s_wrath_svg.zip) with no JS/page errors. Regression: cost, name, faction-type badge, power/health, and card art all render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: RARITY_ICONS urls are hardcoded in factions.js — consider centralizing base Cloudinary URL if more asset sets are added.
In CardTemplate.jsx, rarity uses loading='lazy' by default which is fine, but ensure PrintPage/exported SVGs preload icons (they do via fetch+cache in PrintPage.jsx).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rarity icon feature verified end-to-end on /cards (grid + modal) and /print (hobby, pro, SVG export). Cloudinary SVGs return correctly and load in-browser (naturalWidth=200). Founders Foil aliased to mythic.svg per spec (not directly asserted but code path RARITY_ICONS['Founders Foil']=mythic.svg confirmed by inspection).
